summary: Comprehensive testing of EuroAdria platform after recent changes. All backend APIs (19/19) pass. Frontend pages load correctly. Admin panel navigation works. Article editor has all required fields including new expertTip image field. Schema.org structured data is present. WYSIWYG toolbar is responsive on mobile.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (Recharts) - non-blocking, known from previous iterations

critical_code_review_comments: ExpertTipBox component correctly receives expertTip object prop (line 201 ArticlePage.jsx)
ExpertTip model has optional image field (line 34 models.py)
Admin article form has Bild-URL (optional) field for expert tip image
Schema.org structured data includes ProfessionalService with priceRange, Organization with postalCode, NewsArticle with image/author
WYSIWYG Editor toolbar uses flex-wrap and overflow-x-auto for mobile responsiveness
BlogPosting schema uses formatSchemaDate() for timezone-aware dates (line 51 SEO.jsx)
seed_data_creation: None - MongoDB has seeded investment data (22 locations, 14 infrastructure, 8 zones)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform fully tested. Recent fixes verified: 1) ExpertTipBox props bug fixed - now receives expertTip object, 2) Expert tip image field added to admin form and model, 3) Schema.org warnings fixed (ProfessionalService priceRange, Organization postalCode, BlogPosting timezone), 4) WYSIWYG mobile fix working (tooltips, flex-wrap). MongoDB is empty for articles but has investment data seeded.

pages_tested.homepage: PASS - Hero, TrustBar, FAQ sections visible
pages_tested.investment_dashboard: PASS - 22 Standorte, 14 Infrastruktur, 8 Zones, heatmap visible
pages_tested.roi_calculator: PASS - All input fields present, calculation works
pages_tested.contact: PASS - Form with all fields (Name, Email, Phone, Subject, Message)
pages_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - Analytics with stats cards and charts
pages_tested.admin_sidebar: PASS - All 14 navigation items present (Dashboard, Pipeline, Revenue, Artikel, Seiten, Homepage, Downloads, Leistungen, PDF Generator, Kommentare, Newsletter, Events, Regionen, Investment)
pages_tested.admin_article_editor: PASS - All fields present including Expert Tip with Bild-URL (optional)
pages_tested.admin_pdf_generator: PASS - Title, Subtitle, WYSIWYG editor, PDF herunterladen button

wysiwyg_mobile_test.buttons_visible: PASS - Bold, Italic, H1, H2, H3, Lists, Quote, Link visible
wysiwyg_mobile_test.no_overflow: PASS - Toolbar scrolls horizontally on mobile
